title: Weird Pirated Games: Super Mario Wonderful World (NES)
description:
This is just a lazy hack of "Wonder Rabbit", another unlisenced NES game,
except here SOME (that's right, just some, not all) sprites were changed
into Mario characters, which tend to flicker between Mario and original
sprites. As usual, switching between the characters by pressing A and B at
the EXACT SAME time is a pain in the ass, and the same 5 seconds of looping music will make you go insane after playing it for a few minutes.

The characters are:
Toad - has high jump and shoot
Luigi - can climb beanstalks and ladders
Peach - can fly
Yoshi - can swim underwater and shoot
Mario - can punch with a boxing glove (which is useless compared to
fireballs) and moves painfully slow.
